# UnClick: Agent-Native API Suite

UnClick is a SaaS API platform that provides programmatic access to common web tools
that AI agents cannot otherwise use. It is designed for AI agents, LLM workflows, and
developers building AI-powered applications.

## What UnClick Does

UnClick builds original API-first tools for common agent needs: link pages, scheduling,
problem-solving, and more. AI agents interact with these tools directly via REST API,
without browser automation, screen scraping, or UI interaction.

## Base URL

https://api.unclick.world

## Authentication

All authenticated endpoints require a Bearer token:
  Authorization: Bearer YOUR_API_KEY

Get a free API key at: https://unclick.world

## Available Tools (Live)

### Link-in-Bio API: /v1/links
Create and manage shareable link pages.
- Create pages: POST /v1/links/pages
- Add links: POST /v1/links/pages/:page_id/links
- Analytics: GET /v1/links/pages/:page_id/analytics
- Custom domains: POST /v1/links/domains
- Themes: POST /v1/links/pages/:page_id/theme
Documentation: https://unclick.world/tools/link-in-bio

### Scheduling API: /v1/schedule
Create and manage booking pages.
- Create booking types: POST /v1/schedule/event-types
- Get available slots: GET /v1/schedule/event-types/:id/slots
- Create bookings: POST /v1/schedule/bookings
- Public booking: POST /schedule/:slug/book (no auth required)
Documentation: https://unclick.world/tools/scheduling

## Coming Soon

- Forms API (/v1/forms): form creation and response collection
- Social Posting API (/v1/post): schedule and publish social posts
- Document Signing API (/v1/sign): send and track contract signatures
- Newsletter API (/v1/mail): subscriber management and campaign sending

## Webhooks

Subscribe to events with POST /v1/webhooks.
Supported events: link.created, link.clicked, page.viewed,
booking.created, booking.cancelled, booking.rescheduled

## Pricing

Free tier: 500 API calls/day, both live tools included, no credit card required.

## Contact

Website: https://unclick.world
Docs: https://unclick.world/docs
Email: chris@unclick.world
Built in Melbourne, Australia.
